caption: In a clinical setting, a person wearing a white lab coat, blue gloves, and a face mask stands beside others in blue scrubs. A checklist is overlaid on the screen, featuring items such as "Abdominal wall closure," "GI bleed in ICU," "Family updates," "Admission of transfer patient," "Ex lap for liver injury," and "Ventilator management." As the sequence progresses, the checklist is edited, with "Abdominal wall closure" disappearing and the remaining items shifting upward. A logo consisting of a small icon and the text "Sim Week" is visible in the lower right area of the scene. The individuals in the frames appear to be engaged in a professional interaction, with the person in the white coat gesturing with their hand while facing the others. The background remains consistent across the frames, showing a medical environment with various pieces of equipment.
